zh.Hotham, East Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁霍坦

zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Cave是Sir Alexander Cave和Amphelicia Alice Hotham的兒子，於1340年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁諾斯 凱夫。他於1364年與Lady Maria Genille在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1380年在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Cave是Sir Alexander Cave和Amphelicia Alice Hotham的儿子，于1340年出生在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁諾斯 凱夫。他于1364年与Lady Maria Genille在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1380年在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Cave was born in 1340, in North Cave, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Alexander Cave and Amphelicia Alice Hotham. He married Lady Maria Genille in 1364, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1380, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

Il a épousé Lady Maria Genille en 1364, à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1380, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

Lui sposato Lady Maria Genille nel 1364, nel Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Caveは1340年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングノース カブでSir Alexander CaveとAmphelicia Alice Hothamの息子として生まれた。1364年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンでLady Maria Genilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1380年に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.Hotham, East Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 호섬

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cave(은)는 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 노르스 카브에서 Sir Alexander Cave(와)과 Amphelicia Alice Hotham의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 Lady Maria Genille(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1380년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.North Cave, Yorkshire East Riding, Engla: норт кав, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Cave родился в 1340 г. в местности норт кав, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir Alexander Cave и Amphelicia Alice Hotham. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Maria Genille в 1364 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1380 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.
